mentions.role_in_text: Company whose stock is being discussed as an investment.
mentions.occurrence_sentence: Is D-Wave Stock a Good Investment in 2022
D-Wave's 2000Q Quantum Computer.
So – is there a way to get in on the action? This article explores what D-Wave is, how you can buy D-Wave stock, and whether that's a good idea.

As outlined in this article, it's not easy for retail investors to get targeted exposure to Quantum Computing by buying listed equities – there are simply no pure-play listed Quantum Computing stocks of note. We looked at ETFs (they're OK but constituents typically are not “proper” Quantum Computing companies). We found that VC investment in to Quantum Computing is increasing, but this is restricted to…VC investors. D-Wave's 2000Q Quantum Computer. Source: D-Wave
